fault_hypothesis: The conflict detection on line 65 is incorrect. It uses non-strict inequalities (`<=`, `>=`) which fails to detect conflicts for adjacent (touching) time slots, but the tests expect touching slots to be considered conflicts.

spec.expr: any(not (b__1 <= s or a__1 >= e) for s, e in timeline) == any(b__1 >= s and a__1 <= e for s, e in timeline)

constraints.intent: The buggy overlap detection logic should be equivalent to the correct logic that handles touching intervals.

spec.expr: all(b__1 < s or a__1 > e for s, e in timeline)

constraints.intent: If no conflict is detected, the new window must not touch or overlap any existing slot.

spec.expr: all(result__1[i][1] < result__1[i+1][0] for i in range(len(result__1) - 1))

constraints.intent: The updated timeline must consist of strictly non-overlapping slots.

spec.expr: not any(window[1] == s or window[0] == e for s, e in timeline) or __cbfl_result[0] == False

constraints.intent: If the new window touches an existing slot, the operation should be reported as a failure.
